page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The system is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. This instance does not include any local storage or GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the average tier across multiple performance metrics. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a stress-ng single-core score of 1576.79 and a multi-core score of 33292.22. Memory performance shows a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1856.41 GB/sec, which drops to 114.67 GB/sec for large uncached blocks, alongside a write bandwidth of 53.49 GB/sec. Database operations score 12244.88 on Passmark, while Redis SET operations achieve 31.14 million operations per second. The CPU supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Vector Neural Network Instructions (VNNI), which assist in vector calculations and cryptography tasks.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a standard general-purpose profile with dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring consistent performance without resource sharing. The primary tradeoff is the complete reliance on external storage, as there is no local NVMe or SSD capacity bundled. This configuration is appropriate for workloads such as static web serving, which registers a throughput of 23.96 GB/sec, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and standard database operations that do not require low-latency local scratch space.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Network performance is anchored by a 25 Gbps baseline bandwidth. In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates steady mid-range capabilities, achieving a stress-ng multi-core score of 33292.22 and a Redis SET throughput of 31.14 million operations per second. It supports AVX-512 and VNNI instructions for vector processing. Lacking local storage, this instance is designed for workloads relying on network-attached storage, such as static web serving, multi-threaded data decompression, and distributed database nodes.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 25 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for balanced workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core Intel Xeon platform offering balanced memory-to-CPU allocation and twenty-five Gbps baseline network bandwidth.

128.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with zero local storage
Supports AVX-512 and VNNI instruction sets for vector workloads
Suited for static web serving, Redis deployments, and database operations
